data.title: Osisko Development Secures US$195 Million Financing for Cariboo Gold Project
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from Osisko Development ( (TSE:ODV) ) is now available.

Osisko Development Corp. has announced a US$195 million financing agreement, including a ‘bought deal’ private placement and a non-brokered private placement with a strategic investor. The funds will support the construction of the Cariboo Gold Project and general corporate purposes, positioning the company to advance its goal of becoming an intermediate gold producer. This financing, along with other financial arrangements, is expected to provide sufficient capital for the project, potentially enhancing the company’s market position and stakeholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ODV) stock is a Buy with a C$5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Osisko Development stock, see the TSE:ODV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ODV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ODV is a Neutral.

The overall stock score of 54 reflects significant financial challenges despite positive corporate developments. While technical indicators show some strength, the negative valuation metrics underscore ongoing profitability issues. The company’s future potential hinges on successful project execution and financial improvement.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ODV stock, click here.

More about Osisko Development

Osisko Development Corp. is a North American gold development company focused on revitalizing past-producing mining camps in mining-friendly regions. The company aims to become an intermediate gold producer by advancing its flagship Cariboo Gold Project in British Columbia, Canada, and is also working on the Tintic Project in Utah, USA, and the San Antonio Gold Project in Sonora, Mexico.

Average Trading Volume: 80,944

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$422.3M

The latest announcement is out from Corem Property Group AB Class A ( ($SE:CORE.A) ).

Corem Property Group has announced a change in the total number of shares and votes following a directed issue and an Extraordinary General Meeting. data.title: PMGC Holdings Shifts Focus to CNC Machine Shops
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

ELEVAI Labs Inc. ( (ELAB) ) has issued an update.

On July 25, 2025, PMGC Holdings Inc. entered into a Secondment Agreement with GB Capital Ltd, allowing GB Capital’s employees to provide services to PMGC while remaining employed by GB Capital. This agreement outlines the terms of employment, compensation, and termination conditions for the seconded employees. On July 30, 2025, PMGC Holdings Inc. announced the termination of a previous letter of intent to acquire a U.S.-based electronics manufacturing company, shifting its focus to acquiring CNC machine shops in the aerospace, defense, and industrial markets. This strategic pivot aligns with PMGC’s long-term growth strategy and aims to capitalize on sector-specific demand and efficiencies.

Spark’s Take on ELAB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELAB is a Underperform.

ELEVAI Labs Inc. is rated poorly due to major financial weaknesses, including negative revenue and cash flow issues, which are exacerbated by adverse technical indicators. The lack of favorable valuation metrics further weighs down the stock’s score. The absence of applicable corporate events means no positive catalysts are present to offset these challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on ELAB stock, click here.

More about ELEVAI Labs Inc.

PMGC Holdings Inc. is a diversified public holding company that manages and grows its portfolio through strategic acquisitions, investments, and development across various industries. The company is committed to exploring opportunities in multiple sectors to maximize growth and value.

Almawave S.p.A. ( (IT:AIW) ) just unveiled an update.

Almawave S.p.A. reported total revenues of 22.8 million euros for the first half of 2025, with a notable increase in international revenue share to 27%. The company invested 8 million euros in its IA Velvet platform and other technological solutions, aiming to strengthen its position in the European Artificial Intelligence market. Despite a decrease in EBITDA and net profit compared to 2024, Almawave maintained a positive net financial position and achieved significant progress in technological collaborations and certifications, positioning itself as a key player in AI innovation.

National Electronics Holdings Limited has announced its upcoming annual general meeting (AGM) scheduled for August 26, 2025, in Hong Kong. Siemens Energy AG has announced a change in voting rights, with BlackRock, Inc. crossing a threshold in their shareholding. data.title: Keppel REIT Prices S$300 Million Perpetual Securities to Strengthen Financial Position
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Keppel REIT ( (SG:K71U) ) has issued an update.

Keppel REIT has announced the pricing of its S$300 million 3.78% subordinated perpetual securities under its S$2 billion multicurrency debt issuance program. The proceeds from this issuance will be used to refinance existing borrowings, including the redemption of previously issued securities, and the securities will be listed on the Singapore Exchange. This move is expected to strengthen Keppel REIT’s financial position and provide flexibility in managing its debt obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:K71U) stock is a Hold with a S$0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Keppel REIT stock, see the SG:K71U Stock Forecast page.

More about Keppel REIT

Keppel REIT is a real estate investment trust based in Singapore, primarily focused on investing in a portfolio of income-producing commercial properties. It operates under a multicurrency debt issuance program and is managed by Keppel REIT Management Limited.
